ques: Find two different meanings of the word "harmony" in the Cambridge Dictionary.
answer: Site was blocked by Cloudflare's "Verify you are human" challenge, so the live page could not be loaded. Two Cambridge Dictionary meanings of "harmony": (1) MUSIC — a pleasant musical sound made by different notes being played or sung at the same time; (2) AGREEMENT — a situation in which people are peaceful and agree with each other, or when things seem right or suitable together.
